failed_gate: Factorio 0.15 exact-candidate retention fresh create verdict
harness_error: Factorio fresh-create did not load the expected MIR archive cleanly
root_cause: Factorio 0.15 writes its runtime proof to factorio-current.log but emits no redirected console output.
fix: Use user/factorio-current.log as the authoritative proof when it exists, otherwise fall back to redirected output, and preserve that proof in the retention log path.
regression: Test-MIRPowerShellQuality requires the retention harness to consume factorio-current.log.
